brief.targetAudience: people who want switch from coffee

copyOptions.angle_rationale: The split before-after template is built for transformation storytelling, and coffee-quitters have a visceral before state (jittery, anxious, crash) that Tulsi Green Tea directly resolves with calm, sustained energy.
copyOptions.visual_description: Left panel: a woman in a soft grey t-shirt stands in a dim, warmly lit kitchen, hand resting on her stomach, tired and slightly tense expression, muted grey-beige background with an empty coffee mug visible on the counter behind her. Right panel: the same woman in a dark athletic tank top, flushed cheeks and a wide confident smile, holding the Organica Tulsi Green Tea box toward the camera in a bright, airy space with blurred greenery in the background. The overall palette shifts from desaturated and heavy on the left to fresh, luminous, and green-accented on the right, mimicking authentic user-generated content.
subheadlines: No jitters. No crash. Just Tulsi, green tea, and real calm energy.
Clean ingredients. Steady focus. Zero coffee anxiety holding you back.
Adaptogenic Tulsi meets green tea — your smoother, calmer morning ritual.
